definition.en: Natural hypnosis is the acquiescence of the unconscious to conscious belief.
definition.zh: 自然催眠是无意识对意识信念的默许。

definition.en: Hypnosis is not generally understood in its true light. The hypnotist is not necessary except as a director; and indeed in most cases such a director is necessary. But the hypnotic state is simply a level of awareness in which the personality is freewheeling, so to speak, dissociated from physical reality in its usual terms.
definition.zh: 催眠并未被以其真实面目所理解。催眠师除了作为引导者外并非必要；事实上在大多数情况下这样的引导者是必要的。但催眠状态只是一个觉知的层次，在其中人格可以说是自由运转，脱离了通常意义上的物质现实。

definition.en: Hypnosis is one method of examining dreams.
definition.zh: 催眠是检视梦境的一种方法。

definition.en: Hypnosis is at best a poor tool.
definition.zh: 催眠充其量不过是一个拙劣的工具。

explanation: 催眠是潜意识对显意识信念的顺从。在高度专注、排除干扰的状态下，你向自己植入特定想法，这些想法随后指导潜意识影响身体机制，使其与信念一致。日常生活中，你不断运用这种自然催眠：集中注意力的领域会调节你的生物与心理体验。正式催眠只是让人充分利用专注力，激活潜意识机制，并无神秘之处。催眠师只是引导者，催眠状态不过是意识的一种自由流动、暂时脱离常规物理现实的层次。关键在于，任何负面信念都无法强加于你，除非你显意识接受它。因此，你对自己反复强调的信念，就是最强大的催眠指令。关注积极成就，能自动将能量从问题中抽离，增强自我价值感。理解自然催眠的本质后，你便无需再制造新的负面感受，抑制会减少，

quotes.text: Natural hypnosis and conscious beliefs give their proper instructions to the unconscious, which then dutifully affects the body mechanism so that it responds in a manner harmonious with the beliefs. So you condition your body to react in certain fashions. Dealing with this is not a simple problem, of course, for the original suggestion of dis-ease was in itself given because of another belief. Using formal hypnosis, and in the West, you may regress and discover where the suggestion was first given you. If you and your hypnotist believe in reincarnation, the source may be discovered in another life.
quotes.translation: 自然催眠与有意识信念向无意识下达恰当指令，无意识随后忠实地影响身体机制，使其以与信念和谐的方式作出反应。因此你训练身体以特定方式运作。处理这个问题当然并非易事，因为"不适"的原始暗示本身源于另一个信念。在西方，你可以通过正式催眠回溯并发现最初接受该暗示的源头。若你与催眠师相信轮回转世，则可能在前世找到根源。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Dictation: Natural hypnosis is the acquiescence of the unconscious to conscious belief. In periods of concentrated focus, with all distractions cut out, the desired ideas are then implanted (in formal hypnosis). The same processes occur in normal life, however; areas of primary concentration then regulate your experience both biologically and mentally, and generate similar conditions.
quotes.translation: 口授：自然催眠是无意识对有意识信念的默许。在高度专注时段排除所有干扰后，期望的意念便（在正式催眠中）被植入。然而日常生活中同样发生着相同过程：主要专注领域会从生理与心智层面调节你的体验，并产生类似状态。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There is no magic in hypnosis. Each of you utilize it constantly. (See the 620th session in Chapter Four.) Only when particular procedures are assigned to it, and when it is set aside from normal life, does hypnotic suggestion seem so esoteric. Structured hypnosis merely allows the subject to utilize full powers of concentration, thereby activating unconscious mechanisms.
quotes.translation: 催眠毫无神秘之处。你们每个人都在持续运用它。（见第四章第620节）只有当特定程序被赋予它，且将其与日常生活割裂时，催眠暗示才显得如此深奥。结构化催眠只是让受试者运用全部专注力，从而激活无意识机制。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It becomes a counter suggestion, yet it is all a part of the same hypnotic process, based upon his belief in his original illness. While it gives temporary results, the fact that he needs it reinforces his dependency upon it. If his belief in his poor health continues unchecked, the medicine will no longer serve as an adequate counter measure. It would seem only good sense to refrain from the foods that bring on the condition. Yet each time this is done, the individual acquiesces more and more to the hypnotic suggestion.
quotes.translation: 它成为反向暗示，却仍是同一催眠过程的一部分，基于患者对原始疾病的信念。虽然能产生暂时效果，但患者对药物的需求反而强化了依赖。若对健康状况不佳的信念持续未受抑制，药物将不再足以作为有效对策。避免引发病症的食物看似明智之举，但每次这样做时，个体都在越来越深地默许催眠暗示。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Hypnosis is not generally understood in its true light. The hypnotist is not necessary except as a director; and indeed in most cases such a director is necessary. But the hypnotic state is simply a level of awareness in which the personality is freewheeling, so to speak, dissociated from physical reality in its usual terms.
quotes.translation: 催眠通常未被正确理解。催眠师除作为引导者外并非必需——事实上多数情况下这种引导者确有必要。但催眠状态不过是意识的一种层次，在此状态下人格可说是自由运转，脱离了通常意义上的物质实相。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Hypnosis is one method of examining dreams. Our method is perhaps the best one. The inner self constantly changes its focus. I have said that consciousness is merely the direction in which the inner self focuses at any particular time. In order to examine the reality of dreams it is necessary to change the focus of the inner self to those directions in which the inner self moves, when the ego does not limit its scope to camouflage reality only.
quotes.translation: 催眠是检视梦境的方法之一。我们的方法或许是最佳途径。内在自我持续改变其焦点。我曾说过，意识仅是内在自我在特定时刻聚焦的方向。要检视梦境的实相，必须将内在自我的焦点转向其移动的方向——当自我不再将视野局限于伪装实相时。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Ruburt's mother is part of an entity, and he should remember this. He does not have arthritis, although he has been mimicking the symptoms, and could in time hypnotize himself into believing he did have the disease, though this is highly improbable given his own constitution. The spontaneous self happens to be basically more powerful and far more sensible than the ego, and would never stand for this development. It would doubtless cause some sort of an explosion however, in order to prevent any such occurrence.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏的母亲是一个存有的一部分，他应该记住这一点。他没有关节炎，尽管他一直在模仿关节炎的症状，并且最终可能通过自我催眠让自己相信自己确实患上了这种疾病，但考虑到他的体质，这极不可能发生。自发性自体本质上比自我更强大、更明智得多，绝不会容忍这种发展。不过，它无疑会引发某种爆发，以防止任何此类情况发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: (From the 33rd session for March 9, 1964:) I do not bring about the trance state in the manner of which you [Joseph] are speaking. Ruburt switches on another channel, through which my essence can enter more readily. This certainly does involve a looking inward on his part, but it is not self-hypnosis in usual terms -- merely a focusing upon an objective inner stimulus ... Any such signs (as the powerful, deeper Seth voice) involve camouflage patterns, and do not actually represent direct experience. This is not my voice, for example. It is a representation or approximation of my voice for your edification. Furthermore, in your terms I do not have a voice. But it is a valid representation, and if I say so myself -- that's a pun -- the voice is much like the one I would use....
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年3月9日第33节课：）我并非以你[约瑟夫]所说的方式引发出神状态。鲁柏切换了另一个频道，我的本质可以通过这个频道更容易地进入。这当然涉及他向内看，但这并非通常意义上的自我催眠——只是聚焦于一个客观的内在刺激……任何此类迹象（如强大而深沉的赛斯声音）都涉及伪装模式，并不实际代表直接体验。例如，这不是我的声音。它是为了启迪你们而对我声音的一种再现或近似。此外，用你们的说法，我并没有声音。但这是一个有效的再现，而且如果我自己这么说——这是个双关语——这个声音很像我会使用的那种……
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: For the investigator himself, through his actions, inadvertently brings about, in specific instances, those results for which he looks. The particular experiment may then seem to suggest conditions which are by no means general ones, but which may appear so. In hypnosis the subject is not as much on guard as a subject of an experiment when the subject knows in advance that he will be awakened by the experimenter, when electrodes are attached to the physical organism, when the conditions of the sleep laboratory are substituted for his ordinary nightly environment. It is impossible to study dreams when an attempt is made to isolate the dreamer from his own personality, to treat dreams as if they were physical or mechanical. The only laboratory for a study of dreams is the laboratory of the personality.
quotes.translation: 因为研究者本人通过他的行为，在特定实例中无意中引发了他所寻找的结果。那么，特定的实验可能看起来暗示了绝非普遍的情况，但可能显得如此。在催眠中，受试者不像实验对象那样警惕，当受试者事先知道实验者会唤醒他，当电极连接到身体有机体上，当睡眠实验室的条件取代了他平常的夜间环境时。当试图将做梦者与其自身人格隔离，将梦视为物理或机械现象时，研究梦是不可能的。研究梦的唯一实验室是人格的实验室。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: You have reconstructed it. So when I tell you to restructure your past, I am not telling you to do something that you have not already done. Hypnosis, again, is merely a state of concentrated attention, in which you focus upon beliefs. Popular demonstrations lead the public to believe that the subject must fall asleep or be completely relaxed, yet this is not the case. The one prerequisite is an intense concentration upon specific incoming data to the exclusion of everything else. Therefore the orders given are clear-cut, to the point. No conflicting information is received, no cross messages.
quotes.translation: 你已经重构了它。所以当我告诉你重组你的过去时，我并非让你去做你尚未做过的事。再次强调，催眠只是一种专注注意力的状态，你在其中聚焦于信念。流行的演示让公众相信受试者必须入睡或完全放松，但事实并非如此。唯一的前提条件是对特定输入数据进行强烈专注，排除其他一切。因此，给出的指令清晰明确、切中要点。没有接收到冲突的信息，也没有交叉的信息。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: No negative beliefs were thrust upon you, therefore, despite your will. Period. None can be inflicted upon you that you do not consciously accept. In formal hypnosis, the hypnotist and the subject play a game. If the hypnotist orders the subject to forget what happened, that individual will pretend to do so. In that context both hold the belief in the resulting forgetfulness, and it is the power of belief that is being demonstrated. But instead this is taken as an indication that the conscious mind is helpless under such conditions, generally speaking, and this is not the case.
quotes.translation: 因此，尽管你有意志，但没有任何负面信念被强加于你。句号。没有你未自觉接受的信念能被施加于你。在正式催眠中，催眠师和受试者玩一个游戏。如果催眠师命令受试者忘记所发生的事，那个人会假装这样做。在这种情境下，双方都相信随之而来的遗忘，而这是信念的力量在展现。但相反，这通常被当作意识心智在此类条件下无能为力的迹象，而事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: For other matters a light stage of hypnosis is necessary at this time, and a very careful phrasing of questions. The pendulum is responsive to unconscious muscular speech and does give answers from the subconscious. We are involved in something much deeper. Ruburts subconscious on its own is simply not capable of arriving at the knowledge that you are getting in our sessions.
quotes.translation: 对于其他事项，此时需要轻度的催眠状态，以及非常谨慎的问题措辞。钟摆对无意识的肌肉言语有反应，确实能从潜意识中给出答案。我们涉及的是更深层的东西。鲁柏的潜意识本身根本无法达到我们在课程中获得的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In all such situations, it is highly important that you do not concentrate your main attention in that area of experience with which you are least satisfied. This acts as a deepening of hypnotic suggestion. Just reminding yourself of your other accomplishments will by itself operate in a constructive fashion, even if nothing else is done. Such focus of attention on positive aspects automatically pulls your energy away from the problem. It also builds up your own sense of worth and power as you are reminded of adequate performance at other levels of experience.
quotes.translation: 在所有这类情境中，至关重要的是不要将主要注意力集中在最不满意的经验领域。这会加深催眠暗示。即便不做其他事，仅提醒自己已有的其他成就，其本身就能以建设性的方式运作。将注意力聚焦于积极面向会自动将能量从问题中抽离，同时当你忆起在其他经验层面的充分表现时，也能增强自我价值感与力量感。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: As you understand the nature of natural hypnosis, you will no longer feel the need to generate new negative feelings. Your load of inhibitions will recede. As you trust yourself more you will naturally express your feelings, and their suppression will not bring about explosive reactions any more. They will come and go. The channel to power will be opened more clearly. Attention to your own stream of consciousness is highly important. This alone will help you see in what areas you are denying impulses or giving yourself directions that lead to powerlessness.
quotes.translation: 当你理解自然催眠的本质后，便不再需要制造新的负面感受。你的抑制负担将逐渐消退。随着你更信任自己，自然会表达感受，而压抑不再引发爆炸性反应。感受会来也会去。通往力量的通道将更清晰地敞开。关注自身意识流极为重要，仅此一点就能帮助你看见自己在哪些领域否定冲动，或给予自己导致无力的指令。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: (11:09.) The habit of not facing problems, which indeed are challenges, can be addictive. A feeling of powerlessness in one field can be transferred to others. When this happens through natural hypnosis, then even the psychic territory of power can be assailed. Here the individual becomes thoroughly aroused, threatened, and realizes for the first time perhaps the nature of belief and his or her predicament. Here you have life and death struggles in creative terms. Some miraculous cures or change-abouts in midlife occur as a result.
quotes.translation: （11:09）不面对问题（实为挑战）的习惯可能成瘾。某一领域的无力感会转移至其他领域。当这种情况通过自然催眠发生时，连心灵的力量领域也会受到攻击。此时个体彻底觉醒、感到威胁，或许首次认识到信念的本质与自身困境。在此，你以创造性方式经历生死挣扎。某些奇迹般的疗愈或中年转折便由此产生。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This could be studied to some degree if proper suggestions were given to the individual that he would awaken at the exact point when a dream ends. The dream state and dream conditions could also be studied quite legitimately, and to more purpose, using hypnosis. Here you are working with the mind itself as your material, and merely suggesting that it operate in a certain fashion. You are not tampering with the mechanics of its operation, and therefore automatically altering the conditions.
quotes.translation: 若给予适当暗示，让个体在梦境结束的精确时刻醒来，便可对此进行一定程度的研究。使用催眠也能更合理且更具目的地研究梦境状态与梦境条件。此时你以心智本身为材料，仅建议其以特定方式运作，而非篡改其运作机制，从而自动改变条件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I do not bring about the trance state in the manner of which you are speaking. Ruburt switches another channel on, through which my essence can enter more readily. There is the problem here of my entry also into your conscious minds. This does certainly involve a looking inward on Ruburt's part, but it is not self-hypnosis in the terms usually spoken of, merely a focusing upon an objective inner stimulus in much the same manner that you focus upon an outside camouflage stimulus.
quotes.translation: 我并非以你所言的方式引发出神状态。鲁柏切换了另一频道，使我的本质能更顺畅地进入。此处还涉及我进入你们意识心智的问题。这确实需要鲁柏向内观照，但并非通常所说的自我催眠，而只是聚焦于内在客观刺激，如同你们聚焦于外在伪装刺激一般。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Hypnosis is at best a poor tool. A light trance state, self induced, can yield excellent results in a subject who is trained along these lines. Later we will go into other experiments. As I have said, so-called space travel will be mainly divorced from vehicles, and the use of psychological time is the very first step in this direction.
quotes.translation: 催眠充其量是拙劣的工具。对受过此类训练的受试者而言，自我诱导的浅层出神状态可产生极佳效果。稍后我们将探讨其他实验。如我所言，所谓的太空旅行将主要脱离载具，而使用心理时间是迈向此方向的第一步。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: (Daily life must be maintained at a fairly balanced level however, regardless. If such episodes are upsetting then they are not to be encouraged. Does this mean that I should definitely see to it that such a situation never happens again? Or is that too rigid? I do know that an attitude of permissiveness, generally speaking, is definitely out. It does not seem necessary to refuse to discuss ESP under any conditions with anyone--little ESP was discussed the other evening though Barb asked me to hypnotize her several times and I refused. I think that night it was the charged Emotional climate; Barb's; and that perhaps it is simply certain individuals that I must protect myself against: I will not for example discuss ESP with Barb now. This might be it: the psychotic individual--and I knew that she was at least highly neurotic--may project so strongly that I pick up too much before I apply guards.
quotes.translation: 不过日常生活无论如何必须维持相当平衡的水平。如果这类插曲令人不安，就不该鼓励。这是否意味着我绝对要确保这种情况不再发生？还是说那样太过僵化？我确实知道，一般而言放任的态度绝对不可取。似乎没必要在任何条件下拒绝与任何人讨论超感知觉——那晚虽然芭布多次要求我催眠她，我都拒绝了，但几乎没怎么讨论超感知觉。我认为那晚是芭布情绪氛围过于紧张；也许只是某些特定个体我必须防范：比如现在我不会和芭布讨论超感知觉。或许关键在此：精神病患者——我知道她至少是高度神经质——投射力可能太强，以至于我在设防之前就接收了太多信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I believe that Dr. Instream was here just before twilight this evening. At one time with five particular people, talking to them. At an earlier time there were more people in the room, a small crowd. I believe that hypnosis was under discussion. The slide rule may have been used somehow in a demonstration.
quotes.translation: 我相信今晚黄昏前英斯特里姆博士来过这里。曾与五个特定人物交谈。更早时候房间里人更多，一小群人。我相信当时在讨论催眠。计算尺可能被用于某种演示。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: When hypnosis is more clearly understood and used, and when certain other psychological devices are discovered, it will then be possible to change focus in such a manner, and through psychological testing discover the personality types, the individual types who dwell in various stages of the subconscious.
quotes.translation: 当催眠被更清晰地理解和运用，当某些其他心理工具被发现时，就有可能以这种方式改变焦点，并通过心理测试发现那些栖居于潜意识不同阶段的人格类型、个体类型。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: In formal hypnosis you make an agreement with the hypnotist: For a while you will accept his ideas about reality instead of your own. If he tells you that there is a pink elephant in front of you, then you will see it and believe it is there, and act according to the suggestions given. If you are a good subject and your hypnotist a good practitioner, then blisters can arise on your skin if he tells you that you have been burned.
quotes.translation: 在正式催眠中，你与催眠师达成协议：暂时你会接受他对现实的看法，而非你自己的。如果他告诉你面前有只粉红色大象，你就会看见它并相信它存在，然后根据给出的暗示行动。如果你是个好受试者，你的催眠师是个好实践者，那么如果他告诉你被烫伤了，你皮肤上就会起水泡。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Only in this case the hallucinatory effects are actual constructions upon the plane in question, and involve problems that must be worked out. The hallucinations appear more or less consistent merely because everyone on that particular level is under the effects of self-hypnosis, and because they have already constructed hallucinatory senses, the outer senses, in order to perceive the hallucinatory world that they have created.
quotes.translation: 只是在这种情况下，幻觉效果实际上是该层面上的真实建构，并涉及必须解决的问题。这些幻觉之所以看起来或多或少一致，仅仅因为那个特定层面上的每个人都处于自我催眠的影响下，并且他们已经构建了幻觉感官——外在感官——以便感知他们所创造的幻觉世界。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: One is the cancer drive literature, and television "public service" announcements, in which the seven danger signals of cancer are given. Unfortunately, again, within the framework of your beliefs this also becomes almost a necessity for many -- especially for those who, because of previous experience of one kind or another with the disease, are almost irrational in their fear of it. The literature and announcements act as strong negative suggestions, following the nature of natural hypnosis -- as a conditioning process, you see, where you are looking for specific symptoms, and examining your body under the impetus of fear.
quotes.translation: 其一是癌症宣传资料和电视"公益广告"，列出癌症的七大危险信号。不幸的是，再次强调，在你的信念框架内，这对许多人来说也几乎成为必需品——尤其是那些因过去某种疾病经历而对癌症恐惧近乎非理性的人。这些资料和广告作为强烈的负面暗示，遵循自然催眠的本质——作为一种条件反射过程，你看，你在恐惧的驱使下寻找特定症状，检查自己的身体。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: But the outer ego as you know is that portion of the whole self that is given over to the maintenance of physical manipulations, and it perceives only through those physical equipment, those outer senses. It sees its dominion in jeopardy and rises up in arms. It, the ego, is that small portion of the whole self which the whole self has allowed to be completely, or almost completely, bewitched by the self-hypnotic trance. It is that portion which believes implicitly in the given specifications of the hypnotist, and as such it will be last to leave the trance.
quotes.translation: 但如你所知，外在自我是整体自性中被交付于维持物质操控的那部分，它仅通过那些物质装备、那些外在感官来感知。它眼见自己的领域岌岌可危，便奋起反抗。这个自我，是整体自性允许被自我催眠的恍惚状态完全或几乎完全迷惑的那一小部分。它是那个盲目相信催眠师所给特定指令的部分，因此它将是最后一个离开恍惚状态的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: This other man is at a party of sorts, a gathering. （Pause at 10:07.） Dr. Instreams own experiments in hypnosis are now going well, and he received a particular communication yesterday in regard to them. Either then, or the communication was sent yesterday.
quotes.translation: 这另一个人正在参加某种聚会、一个集会。（10:07停顿。）英斯特里姆博士自己的催眠实验现在进展顺利，他昨天收到了一份关于这些实验的特别通讯。要么是那时，要么是通讯是昨天发出的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: His hypnosis experiments are not doing as well as he hoped, as far as other parties are concerned. They have to do with direct stimuli, applied through hypnosis at a distance; and there is a connection in his mind with myself here, and those experiments.
quotes.translation: 就其他方面而言，他的催眠实验并不如他所愿那般顺利。这些实验涉及通过远距离催眠施加的直接刺激；在他心中，这些实验与我本人以及那些实验之间存在某种关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It should be obvious that there is nothing strange in the fact that the dreaming self and the waking self appear so unfamiliar to each other. The study of hypnotism will greatly enlarge man's understanding of human personality in general. These separate states of consciousness, these multiple levels of awareness, these seemingly unrelated personality aspects, are not unnatural artificial productions, brought about through hypnosis. Hypnotism is merely a method that allows you to study the personality directly.
quotes.translation: 做梦的自我与醒时的自我彼此显得如此陌生，这其实并无任何奇怪之处。对催眠术的研究将大大增进人类对整体人格的理解。这些分离的意识状态、这些多重的觉知层次、这些看似无关的人格面向，并非通过催眠产生的不自然的、人为的产物。催眠术仅仅是一种让你能够直接研究人格的方法。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: New paragraph. Those incidents are recorded unconsciously, however, if they applied to your direct experience; and under hypnosis, for example, you could make them your own. So there are different kinds of memories. You share certain biological similarities with your parents, but there are other biological groupings not understood, uniting counterparts in any given century.
quotes.translation: 新段落。然而，如果那些事件适用于你的直接经验，它们会被无意识地记录下来；例如，在催眠状态下，你可以将它们化为己有。所以存在着不同种类的记忆。你与父母共享某些生物学上的相似性，但还有其他未被理解的生物学分组，将任何特定世纪中的对应体联结起来。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 724
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You are paying in advance for illness that you are certain will come your way. You are making all preparations in the present for a future of illness. You are betting upon disease and not health. This is the worst kind of natural hypnosis, and yet within your system insurance is indeed a necessity, because the belief in illness so pervades your mental atmosphere.
quotes.translation: 你正在为你确信会降临的疾病预先付出代价。你正在当下为未来的疾病做一切准备。你押注于疾病而非健康。这是最糟糕的一种自然催眠，然而在你的系统内，保险确实是必要的，因为对疾病的信念如此弥漫于你的心智氛围中。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You cannot now do this physically, but you can do this through the use of the inner senses, trance states, hypnosis experiences, and intelligent use of the intuitions and imaginative powers. The universe is transparent to the inner senses. It is transparent functionally. It exists electromagnetically. All realities within it exist in their own band of intensity.
quotes.translation: 你现在无法在物质层面做到这一点，但你可以通过使用内在感官、出神状态、催眠体验，以及直觉和想象力的明智运用来实现。宇宙对内在感官而言是透明的。它在功能上是透明的。它以电磁方式存在。其中的所有实相都存在于各自的强度波段中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It should be noted however, that with the exception of several other circumstances the various levels of the subconscious can be found to fall within definite temperature ranges. To some extent this fact can be ascertained through hypnosis. However, suggestion as to the effect that the subjects temperature should rise or fall would tend to obscure the effect.
quotes.translation: 然而应当注意的是，除少数其他情况外，潜意识的各个层次通常可发现落在特定的温度范围内。这一事实在某种程度上可通过催眠来确认。然而，关于受试者体温应升高或降低的暗示，往往会掩盖这一效应。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now. These effects, these various seemingly separate selves that can be demonstrated through hypnosis, operate continually and quite normally in both the waking and the dream states. There is however a cooperation that exists between these seemingly separate aspects of the self. It goes without saying that some overall direction must be, and is, maintained.
quotes.translation: 现在。这些效应，这些通过催眠可展现的看似分离的各个自我，在清醒状态和梦境中持续且相当正常地运作。然而，自我这些看似分离的面向之间存在着合作。不言而喻，某种整体方向必须且确实被维持着。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Let us first of all discuss the nature of hypnosis, quite natural hypnosis, and the ways in which you use it now. Then you will see how you can utilize it quite easily and deliberately in your present point of power.
quotes.translation: 让我们首先讨论催眠的本质——相当自然的催眠——以及你现在使用它的方式。然后你将看到，在你当前的力量点上，如何能相当轻松且刻意地运用它。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: You concentrate with great vigor upon one idea, usually to the exclusion of others. It is a quite conscious performance. As such it also portrays the importance of belief, for using hypnosis you "force-feed" a belief to yourself, or one given to you by another -- a "hypnotist"; but you concentrate all of your attention upon the idea presented.
quotes.translation: 你以极大的活力专注于一个想法，通常排除其他想法。这是一个相当有意识的行为。正因如此，它也描绘了信念的重要性，因为使用催眠时，你是在"强行灌输"一个信念给自己，或由他人——一个"催眠师"——给予你的信念；但你会将所有注意力集中在所呈现的想法上。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The portrait that you sent to the gallery is evocative. It continues to grow. It is not completely at the mercy of a completed camouflage. The whole self is never completely constructed on your plane. At best it finds expression now and then. A camouflage plane, merely by being what it is, makes it impossible for the whole self to find expression. There is almost hypnotic focus of energy for a particular time for a particular reason.
quotes.translation: 你送到画廊的画像具有唤起性。它持续成长。它并非完全受制于一个完成的伪装。整体自我从未在你的层面上完全构建。充其量它只是偶尔找到表达。一个伪装层面，仅仅因其本质，就使得整体自我无法找到表达。为了特定理由在特定时刻，存在着近乎催眠式的能量聚焦。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This is the reason for the results of some experiments being conducted abroad, in which accelerated learning takes place, when under hypnosis or otherwise a present individual is convinced that he or she is, for example, a great painter, or a linguist. The present belief activates "latent" abilities within each person.*
quotes.translation: 这就是国外某些实验结果的缘由——在催眠或类似状态下，当一个人被说服相信自己是一位伟大的画家或语言学家时，加速学习便会发生。当下的信念激活了每个人内在的"潜在"能力。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This is an abdication of the severest kind, involving both your spirituality and your biological nature; you feel trapped far more than an animal in a dire situation, and you deny yourself the ability to act. The withheld power is itself transferred, then. In Dineen's case it was put onto another. If she could not make decisions this other person could, through long-distance hypnosis, force her to act whether she wanted to or not.
quotes.translation: 这是一种最严重的放弃，既涉及你的灵性也涉及你的生物本性；你比身处绝境的动物更感到被困住，并且你否定了自己行动的能力。被压抑的力量于是被转移。在迪宁的案例中，它被转移到了另一个人身上。如果她无法做决定，这个人就能通过远程催眠迫使她行动，无论她是否愿意。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Until you change your belief, you will continue to utilize your food in the same fashion -- and to overeat. Momentary gains will not last. Your entire behavior pattern operates according to the strong hypnotic suggestions given, and then of course your appearance and experience always reinforce your belief.
quotes.translation: 除非你改变信念，否则你会继续以同样的方式利用食物——并且暴饮暴食。暂时的收获不会持久。你的整个行为模式都按照所给予的强大催眠暗示运作，当然，你的外表和经历总是会强化你的信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is the perspective in which psychic motion occurs. In hypnosis for example a trance is said to be light or deep. This corresponds somewhat to the kind of depth that is involved here. Unfortunately, when you think of depth you think in terms of a movement at once inward and outward.
quotes.translation: 这是心灵运动发生的视角。例如在催眠中，恍惚状态被说成是浅层或深层。这多少对应于这里所涉及的那种深度。不幸的是，当你想到深度时，你总以同时向内和向外的运动来思考。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The odor experience becomes a part of memory and can be recalled through hypnosis. Sometimes it will arise spontaneously, as any memory may. The odor is as legitimate to the physical organism as any odor smelled in the waking condition. This is fairly important.
quotes.translation: 气味体验成为记忆的一部分，可以通过催眠回忆起来。有时它会像任何记忆一样自发浮现。对生理机体而言，这种气味与清醒状态下闻到的任何气味同样真实。这一点相当重要。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I pick up a connection with a recent paper that is inadequate. A professional paper or report. Either he is not satisfied with it, or others are not. Having to do with hypnosis. Perhaps the initials F R having a connection with the paper and this data.
quotes.translation: 我捕捉到与近期一篇不充分的论文的关联。一篇专业论文或报告。要么是他自己不满意，要么是别人不满意。与催眠有关。或许首字母F R与这篇论文和这些资料有关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: In some respects this dissipates the energy, of course. In the dream state you manipulate energy more directly. This is what you are doing of course in self-hypnosis: Rut, used for therapy, you are still trying to affect or change something physical.
quotes.translation: 在某些方面，这当然会消耗能量。在梦境状态中，你更直接地操纵能量。这正是你在自我催眠中所做的：但用于治疗时，你仍在试图影响或改变某种物质性的东西。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: A snag. Perhaps some difficulty in his hypnosis experiments which had been going so well. For some reason however there seems to be better chances in his ESP card experiments, though not of as spectacular nature as those earlier achieved. （Pause.）
quotes.translation: 一个障碍。或许是他一直进展顺利的催眠实验遇到了困难。但出于某种原因，他的超感官知觉卡片实验似乎更有机会成功，尽管不如早期取得的那些实验那么引人注目。（停顿。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Hypnosis will work well to help your physical and even mental conditions. It is after all only a means of reaching the whole self and of acquainting the ego, through effects, with the abilities of the whole self, of which it is but a part.
quotes.translation: 催眠将有效帮助你改善身体甚至心理状况。毕竟它只是到达完整自我的手段，并通过效果让自我认识完整自我的能力——自我不过是完整自我的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The point of power exercise is meant to familiarize you with your own energy and your ability to direct it. The natural hypnosis exercises (given in the last chapter) allows you greater effectiveness in directing and focusing that power.
quotes.translation: 力量练习点的目的是让你熟悉自己的能量及引导它的能力。自然催眠练习（在上一章中给出）能让你更有效地引导和聚焦那股力量。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: Hypnosis clearly shows in concentrated form the way in which your beliefs affect your behavior in normal life. The various methods simply focus all of your concentration upon a specific area, shutting out any distractions.
quotes.translation: 催眠以浓缩形式清楚展示了你的信念如何在日常生活中影响你的行为。各种方法只是将你所有的注意力集中在特定领域，排除任何干扰。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Other impressions, a mouse. A tiff or argument with a colleague, pertaining to the interpretation of a particular passage in a book, or perhaps in a speech. Having to do with a connection between hypnosis and clairvoyance.
quotes.translation: 其他印象：一只老鼠。与同事关于书中某段文字或某篇演讲的解读发生的小争执或争论。涉及催眠与千里眼之间的关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Something I believe also to do with conditioned reflexes, set up through the hypnotic situation, with himself as hypnotist, and in connection with two other particular individuals.
quotes.translation: 我认为这还与通过催眠情境建立的条件反射有关，他既是催眠师，又与另外两个特定个体相关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The results, then, as easily and effortlessly follow. Natural hypnosis, in the terms given here, operates as well in one case as in the other.
quotes.translation: 因此，结果会自然而然地轻松呈现。在此处所述的术语中，自然催眠在一种情况下与另一种情况下同样运作。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your beliefs, then, are like hypnotic focuses. You reinforce them constantly through the normal inner talking in which you all indulge.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们的信念就像催眠的焦点。你们通过自己都沉浸其中的日常内在对话不断强化它们。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: His hypnosis experiments have a unique effect or success, that should be meaningful to him by the time he reads this material.
quotes.translation: 他的催眠实验具有独特的效果或成功，当他读到这份资料时，这对他而言应该具有意义。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json
